# User Betting Preferences

## Core Reminders
- Stats first: corners, cards, fouls, shots, games, sets, frames.
- Goals/BTTS/ML are fallback markets only when no statistical market is available.
- Prefer multi-sport coverage and less efficient leagues when the data supports it.
- Keep picks conditional; Betclic odds are verified by the user in the app.
- Use full team/player names and clear Polish market descriptions.

## Practical Notes
- Working bankroll is small; leave budget unused when the board is weak.
- The Betclic Statystyki tab is limited and not available for every league.
- Do not scrape Betclic for odds; treat all prices as reference only.
